title: Theme Song Ayanami ver Containing Beatles Riff
display_title: Theme Song Ayanami ver Containing Beatles Riff
wikitext:
[]: Theme Song, Ayanami ver. Containing Beatles Riff? Post by Aether » Mon Mar 30, 2015 8:05 pm I don't know how many of you have ever heard it, but from the album "The Birthday of Rei Ayanami"(which happens to be today), there's a version of Cruel Angel's Thesis sung by Hayashibara, and it's accompanied by a few guitar solos. Maybe it's just me, or maybe it's a really common riff, but doesn't the first guitar solo sound a lot like the Beatles' Day Tripper?

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Mar 31, 2015 6:02 pm There is a thread for this, but I believe that this is what you're looking for. Skip a couple of seconds in, the creator put in this intro with some other song.
